gsp.note: US GSP expired December 31, 2020. Not reauthorized as of April 2026. India was separately terminated from GSP on June 5, 2019.
gsp.relevance: NONE for current imports. Special column markers (A, A*, A+) in HTSUS are dormant.

fta_partners.note: The US has no FTA with India, China, Vietnam, or the EU. No preferential tariff rates apply to any of our 8 trade lanes via FTA.

india.note: India graduated from EU GSP for 2024-2026 cycle on most industrial products including: base metals (Section XV), machinery and electrical equipment (Section XVI), and chemicals (Section VI). Product-specific graduation means no GSP preference applies to our 5 product families.

china.note: China is not a GSP beneficiary in the EU scheme. MFN rates apply.

vietnam.note: Vietnam has the EU-Vietnam FTA (EVFTA) which provides better rates than GSP. GSP preferences are superseded by EVFTA.

electronics_8534_8542.note: Already 0% MFN under ITA. EVFTA does not change the rate.

chemicals_2903.staging: Immediate elimination for most chemical products
chemicals_2903.note: Most Chapter 29 products had tariffs eliminated at entry into force or within 3-7 years. By 2026, most are at 0%.

copper_wire_7408_7413_8544.note: Copper wire and insulated conductors: tariff elimination over 5-7 year staging. Many lines at 0% by 2025-2026. Verify specific line.

aluminum_7604_7608_7610_7616.note: Aluminum products have staged reductions. Many lines approaching 0% by 2026-2027. Verify specific line.

evfta.rules_of_origin: EVFTA requires goods to originate in Vietnam per the agreement's rules of origin protocol. Transshipment through Vietnam of Chinese-origin goods does NOT qualify.

IN_US.additional_duties: Reciprocal tariffs may apply - CHECK CURRENT STATUS
IN_US.notes: India->US: MFN + possible reciprocal tariff. No preference programs available.

IN_EU.preferences: NONE (India graduated from EU GSP on our product categories)
IN_EU.notes: India->EU: Standard MFN rate. No preferences for our products.

CN_US.additional_duties: Section 301 (25%), Section 232 (25% on aluminum), reciprocal tariffs - CHECK CURRENT STATUS
CN_US.notes: China->US: HIGHEST duty lane. MFN + Section 301 + Section 232 (aluminum) + reciprocal tariffs. Multiple layers stack.

CN_EU.additional_duties: EU anti-dumping on aluminum extrusions from China (21.2-32.1%)
CN_EU.notes: China->EU: MFN + possible EU anti-dumping on aluminum. No additional duties on electronics or chemicals.

VN_US.additional_duties: Reciprocal tariffs may apply - CHECK CURRENT STATUS
VN_US.notes: Vietnam->US: MFN + possible reciprocal tariff. No FTA preference.

VN_EU.notes: Vietnam->EU: BEST available rate for EU lanes. EVFTA provides 0% on most products if rules of origin are met.

EU_US.additional_duties: Reciprocal tariffs may apply - CHECK CURRENT STATUS. Section 232 applies to aluminum regardless of origin.
EU_US.notes: EU->US: MFN + possible reciprocal tariff + Section 232 on aluminum. No FTA preference.

sources: EU-Vietnam FTA text and tariff schedules
